user.title: Connect to Joule Sous Vide
user.description: Select a discovered Joule. If none are listed, enter the Bluetooth address manually.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Add {name}?
bluetooth_confirm.description: Home Assistant discovered this Joule over Bluetooth.

breville.title: Import Auth Key from Breville+
breville.description: Enter Breville+ credentials to import the BLE auth key from your account. Credentials are used once and are not saved. Leave these fields empty to pair manually with the Joule button instead. The serial number is optional unless your account has multiple Joules.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Make sure the Joule is powered on and in Bluetooth range.
error.missing_breville_credentials: Enter both Breville+ email and password, or leave both blank.
error.breville_appliance_not_found: Could not find a matching Joule in that Breville+ account. Enter the Joule serial number and try again.
error.breville_cloud_error: Breville+ key import failed. Try again later.

abort.already_configured: This Joule device is already configured.
abort.not_supported: This Bluetooth device is not a Joule.

breville.title: Import Auth Key from Breville+
breville.description: Enter Breville+ credentials to import the BLE auth key from your account. Credentials are used once and are not saved. The serial number is optional unless your account has multiple Joules.

manual_key.title: Manual Auth Key
manual_key.description: Paste a BLE auth key captured elsewhere. Leave empty to clear the saved key.

error.invalid_auth_key: Invalid hex string. The auth key must be a valid hexadecimal value.
error.missing_breville_credentials: Enter both Breville+ email and password, or leave both blank.
error.breville_appliance_not_found: Could not find a matching Joule in that Breville+ account. Enter the Joule serial number and try again.
error.breville_cloud_error: Breville+ key import failed. Try again later.
